Title: Navigate to Registration Page
Preconditions: User is on ParaBank home page

Title: Register with Valid Data
Test Steps:
1. Enter valid First Name, Last Name, Address, City, State, Zip, Phone, SSN, unique Username, Password, Confirm Password
2. Click 'Register'
Expected Result: User is registered and welcome message is shown

Title: Mandatory Field Validation
Test Steps:
1. Leave one or more mandatory fields empty
2. Click 'Register'
Expected Result: Error message for missing mandatory fields

Title: Username Uniqueness Validation
Test Steps:
1. Enter all valid data but use an existing Username
2. Click 'Register'

Title: Password and Confirm Password Mismatch
Test Steps:
1. Enter valid data but different Password and Confirm Password
2. Click 'Register'

Title: Invalid Phone Number Format
Test Steps:
1. Enter invalid phone number (e.g., letters or too short)
2. Fill other fields validly
3. Click 'Register'

Title: Invalid SSN Format
Test Steps:
1. Enter invalid SSN (e.g., not 9 digits, contains letters)
2. Fill other fields validly
3. Click 'Register'

Title: Boundary: Minimum Length for Username
Test Steps:
1. Enter username with minimum allowed length
2. Fill other fields validly
3. Click 'Register'
Expected Result: Registration succeeds if length is valid

Title: Boundary: Maximum Length for Username
Test Steps:
1. Enter username with maximum allowed length
2. Fill other fields validly
3. Click 'Register'
Expected Result: Registration succeeds if length is valid

Title: Boundary: Minimum Length for Password
Test Steps:
1. Enter password with minimum allowed length
2. Fill other fields validly
3. Click 'Register'
Expected Result: Registration succeeds if length is valid

Title: Boundary: Maximum Length for Password
Test Steps:
1. Enter password with maximum allowed length
2. Fill other fields validly
3. Click 'Register'
Expected Result: Registration succeeds if length is valid

Title: Registration with Special Characters in Address Fields
Test Steps:
1. Enter special characters in Address, City, State fields
2. Fill other fields validly
3. Click 'Register'
Expected Result: Registration succeeds if characters are allowed

Title: Registration with Leading/Trailing Spaces in Input Fields
Test Steps:
1. Enter leading/trailing spaces in input fields
2. Fill other fields validly
3. Click 'Register'
Expected Result: Spaces are trimmed and registration succeeds
